name: Patient Case 1
history: Brother died by suicide when the patient was young. Ongoing family conflict about discussing the loss. Parents initially did not allow the patient to seek talk therapy after the death.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: I can't change what happened, and I am stuck with these feelings.
intermediate_belief_depression: I will always feel this way and nothing will get better.
coping_strategies: Avoiding discussions about the brother and the loss.
situation: Realizing that the brother's birthday is approaching.
auto_thought: I can't handle this time of year; it will always be painful.
behavior: Withdrawal from social interactions and family discussions.
